dto.creator: mwojtkiewicz
dto.testProcedure:
• Setup Adult Environment for NIV as shown in chapter 2.2
• Activate the magic key Pressure trigger and restart the device.
• Select Patient Group Adult and set patient height to 174 cm.
• Select Mode PCV+
• Set the Leak-Valve to 0%

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Hinweis:
Während des Parameterchecks und der Kalibration dürfen keine Schläuche am Fluke VT900A montiert sein. 

Achtung:
Der Fluke VT900A darf nur mit einem Filter betrieben werden (PN 279988), welcher sich am Inspirationseingange befindet.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........(General) Fluke VT900A - Parametercheck and calibration

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: The magic key Pressure trigger activated and the device restarted.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Activate the magic key Pressure trigger and restart the device.
Set the Leak-Valve to 0%

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: In [Controls], switching between flow and pressure trigger is possible.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Go to [Controls] and check if it is possible to switch between flow and pressure trigger.

testSectionDTOList.title: Lower Limit Control Setting Pressure Trigger
........ (Evaluation) Lower Limit Control Setting Pressure Trigger
Upper Limit Control Setting Pressure Trigger
........ (Evaluation) Upper Limit Control Setting Pressure Trigger

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: The pressure trigger is set to off when trying to get over -15.0 cmH2O
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Go to [Controls] and check if the pressure trigger is set to off when trying to get over -15.0 cmH2O

testSectionDTOList.title: Digit Number Validation Control Setting Pressure Trigger

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue:
ptriggert_str = str(PTrigger)
parts = ptrigger_str.split('.')
before_decimal = len(parts[0])
after_decimal = len(parts[1]) if len(parts) > 1 else 0
notation_valid = False
if PTrigger < 10 and before_decimal == 1 and after_decimal == 1:
    notation_valid = True
elif PTrigger >= 10 and before_decimal == 2 and after_decimal == 1:
    notation_valid = True

ptrigger_str = str(PTrigger)
parts = ptrigger_str.split('.')
before_decimal = len(parts[0])
after_decimal = len(parts[1]) if len(parts) > 1 else 0
notation_valid = False
if PTrigger < 10 and before_decimal == 1 and after_decimal == 1:
    notation_valid = True
elif PTrigger >= 10 and before_decimal == 2 and after_decimal == 1:
    notation_valid = True

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: The magic key Pressure trigger deactivated and the device restarted.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Deactivate the magic key Pressure trigger and restart the device.

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: In [Controls], the pressure trigger is NOT available.
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Go to [Controls] and check if it the pressure trigger is NOT available.

testSectionDTOList.title: Lower Limit Control Setting Flow Trigger
........ (Evaluation) Lower Limit Control Setting Pressure Trigger
Upper Limit Control Setting Pressure Trigger
........ (Evaluation) Upper Limit Control Setting Pressure Trigger

testElementDTOList.notificationTextEnglish: The flow trigger is NOT set to off when trying to get over 20.0 l/min
testElementDTOList.notificationTextGerman: Go to [Controls] and check if the flow trigger is NOT set to off when trying to get over 20.0 l/min

testSectionDTOList.title: ........(Exec)1 l/min < Flow Trigger <2 l/min - initial value
........(Evaluation)1 l/min < Flow Trigger <2 l/min- initial value
........(Exec)1 l/min < Flow Trigger <2 l/min - value change
........(Evaluation)1 l/min < Flow Trigger <2 l/min - value change
........(Exec)2 l/min < Flow Trigger <20 l/min - initial value
........(Evaluation)2 l/min < Flow Trigger <20 l/min - initial value
........(Exec)2 l/min < Flow Trigger <20 l/min - value change
........(Evaluation)2 l/min < Flow Trigger <20 l/min - value change
Digit Number Validation Control Setting Flow Trigger

parts = ftrigger_str.split('.')
before_decimal = len(parts[0])
after_decimal = len(parts[1]) if len(parts) > 1 else 0

if FTrigger < 10 and before_decimal == 1 and after_decimal == 1:

elif FTrigger >= 10 and before_decimal == 2 and after_decimal == 1:

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Use the adult test environment for P-Trigger as shown in Chapter 2.2.

For the test with high P-trigger use the following setup:
Connect the syringe directly to the back of the flow-analyzer. Connect the DUT to the front of the flow analyzer.

For the test with low P-trigger use the following setup:
Connect the Michigan test lung to the back of the flow-analyzer. Connect the DUT to the front of the flow-analyzer.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........(General) Environment setup
